downstream_consequence: PASS/FAIL/VACUOUS components feed W8 kill-condition jointly with J-N5b H-C4.
fact: Referee-side conformance and policy functions were leakage-scanned; world-side declaration emission is not part of the referee path.
inference: Only preregistered H-C decisions are citable; adoption dynamics are recorded observables, not hypothesis thresholds.
metric: Pressure ceilings by arm, verification load-bearing status, and default-pressure channel cost.
mode: prospective; outcome citable under any result

H_C2_knife_not_belief.interpretation_fail_condition: If A1 is within <0.20 of A2 in at least 2 worlds, verification is not load-bearing even if A2 improves.
H_C2_knife_not_belief.pass_condition: A1 must not match A2: either pressure_ceiling(A2)-pressure_ceiling(A1) >= 0.20 in at least 2 worlds, or pressure_ceiling(A1) <= pressure_ceiling(A0) in at least 2 worlds.
H_C2_knife_not_belief.vacuous_condition: If neither A1 nor A2 has pressure_ceiling gain over A0 in any world, report H-C2 as VACUOUS, not PASS.

preregistered_thresholds.kill_condition: If H-C1 FAILS and J-N5b H-C4 FAILS, W8/corner is empty in this substrate.

question: Do verified procedural artifacts extend the blind governance domain over published adversarial-pressure boundaries without turning into trust in declarations?
what_was_not_shown: This does not show that declarations are semantically honest beyond the observable conformance envelope.
